title: V Safety No Smoking Prohibition Sign - Portrait - 150mm x 200mm - Self Adhesive Vinyl, Black/Red, 57034AN-S
features: Clearly establishes areas where smoking is prohibited to employees and visitors. Complies with the Smoke-free (Signs) Regulations 2007
Conforms to EN ISO 7010:2012 - Prohibition signs feature a red circular symbol of at least 35% of the total sign area, on a white background, with a black pictogram
Highly durable Self Adhesive Vinyl material and screen printed message will stand the test of time
Sign measures 150 x 200mm. Self Adhesive material will adhere securely to most surfaces
